title: gladiolus carneus
intro: Gladiolus carneus, also known as the spotted gladiolus or red milk lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus carneus include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
